# devicePlacement

**Instance Property**

The physical position of the accessory.

## Declaration

```swift
var devicePlacement: AccessoryControlDevice.Placement?
```

## Discussion

Update this property when your accessory detects a change in its position. If the accessory doesn’t support the [doc://com.apple.audioaccessorykit/documentation/AudioAccessoryKit/AccessoryControlDevice/Capabilities/placement] capability, the value of this property is always `nil`.

## Accessing configuration options

- **deviceCapabilities**: The capabilities the accessory supports.
- **primaryAudioSourceDeviceIdentifier**: The Bluetooth address of the device providing the primary source of audio.
- **secondaryAudioSourceDeviceIdentifier**: The Bluetooth address of the device providing the secondary source of audio.
